additions.entry: ChainedInstruction class, representing a new full instruction orchestrator
IStepHandler interface, representing an atomic executable step handler
ICompiledStep interface, representing the compiled variant of a step handler
ConfigStep record, representing the structure parsed from the XML file

refactorings.entry: IInstructionSet to store new instruction layout
IStepHandlerRegistry, to take the responsibility of an singleton step handler registry

removals.entry: AbstractInstruction, since it is not required in the new instruction layout
IInstructionRegistry, since the concept of instructions was removed

additions.entry: InvalidOperandException, to make error reporting more precise
IPrecompilerStage interface, to add stageable precompilation of config instructions to real instructions

refactorings.entry: InstructionParser to parse according to the new file structure
ConcreteCompiler, to compile the new instruction layout
Executor, to work with new instruction layout

additions.entry: InstructionSetMigrator, to migrate instruction sets files throughout all (upcoming) versions
ConcreteCompiledStep class, representing a working default implementation
ConcreteStepHandlerRegistry singleton, containing all "singleton" instruction step handlers
InstructionPrecompilerStage, default precompilation stage, to convert ConfigInstructions into ChainedInstructions
InstructionStepPrecompilerStage, default step precompilation stage, to convert ConfigSteps into fitting IStepHandler. Used by InstructionPrecompilerStage.

refactorings.entry: XmlConstants to contain tags and attributes of the new XML file structure
InstructionParser, to only have the responsibility of parsing the actual instructions
InstructionParser, to use the new StepHandlerRegistry
CoreConfig, to store a precompilation pipeline
CoreConfigParser, to use the precompilation pipeline
all `*Instruction.java` files, to be `*StepHandler.java` files in the new instruction layout
